purpose: Argyle Faculty Dashboard is a command center for faculty to manage agents, alerts, CLI, integrations, and workflows, with a focus on launching rehearsals.

primary_workflows.name: Launch Rehearsal
primary_workflows.description: User initiates a rehearsal run from any hub page

primary_workflows.name: Manage Agents
primary_workflows.description: User views and manages AI agents

primary_workflows.name: Configure Alerts
primary_workflows.description: User sets up alerts for system events

dashboard_gaps: No overview of recent activity or system health on the main dashboard
navigation_issues: All hub pages appear identical with only a 'Launch Rehearsal' button, making it unclear what distinguishes each page

user_types_observed.evidence: Dashboard is named 'Faculty Dashboard' and includes workspace configuration
user_types_observed.primary_goal: Oversee and manage rehearsal runs and system settings

user_types_observed.evidence: Presence of CLI, agents, and integrations pages
user_types_observed.primary_goal: Develop and test AI agents and workflows

quality_concerns.concern: All hub pages have identical content (only 'Launch Rehearsal' button), providing no unique information per section
No data or metrics displayed on any page; all pages appear empty except for the button
Crawl detected 0 words on all pages, suggesting content may be loaded dynamically or missing
